description_long: This kiosk is a compact, rectangular unit with a predominantly gray and black color scheme, featuring a flat top with two distinct lidded compartments. The front panel is equipped with a digital display, multiple buttons, and two dispensing nozzles, suggesting it is a self-service beverage or snack machine. Below the control panel, there is a recessed area with additional controls and receptacles for cups or containers. The sides are plain and smooth, with minimal detailing, while the back is featureless except for the continuation of the flat top. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with clean lines and a focus on functionality. The materials appear to be mostly metal and plastic, giving it a sturdy and durable appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a digital display, dual dispensing nozzles, and lidded top compartments, finished in gray and black. Its design is functional and robust, ideal for urban self-service use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the digital display, control buttons, two dispensing nozzles, and recessed area for cup placement.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a plain, smooth surface with a slight protrusion at the front for the dispensing area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a flat, featureless surface with two lidded compartments visible on the top.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with a smooth surface and visible dispensing area at the front.
attribute_signage_type: digital display with printed button labels, centrally placed above dispensing area
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with two rectangular lidded compartments, made of metal or plastic, no overhangs or decorative elements
